raw_content:
I'll start by exploring the current directory to understand what files are available, then work on creating the C program.

<arg_key>analysis</arg_key>
<arg_value>Good, I can see the BPE vocab file format. It's a simple text format with token-count pairs. Let me examine the checkpoint file structure. TensorFlow checkpoints can be in different formats - let me check if it's a text or binary file.</arg_value>
<arg_key>plan</arg_key>
<arg_value>Check the checkpoint file format by looking at the first bytes</arg_value>
<arg_key>commands</arg_key>
<arg_value>file gpt2-124M.ckpt
head -c 1000 gpt2-124M.ckpt | xxd | head -20</arg_value>
</tool_call>
</assistant>
